tools.name: json_to_csv
tools.description: Convert a JSON array of objects to CSV text. Optionally specify a delimiter.

tools.name: csv_to_json
tools.description: Parse CSV text into a JSON array of objects.

tools.name: json_to_xml
tools.description: Convert a JSON object or array to XML string.

tools.name: flatten
tools.description: Flatten a nested JSON object into dot-notation keys.

tools.name: unflatten
tools.description: Unflatten a dot-notation JSON object back into nested structure.

tools.name: filter
tools.description: Filter a JSON array by a query object. Supports >, <, ! prefixes for comparisons.

tools.name: pick
tools.description: Pick specific fields from each object in a JSON array.

tools.name: sort
tools.description: Sort a JSON array by a field.

tools.name: stats
tools.description: Compute statistics (count, sum, mean, min, max, median) for a numeric field.

tools.name: validate
tools.description: Validate a JSON string and return type, size, or error.
